Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has [initial_dogs] dogs. On Thursday, she received [puppies_received] puppies from a nearby town, which added to her existing [initial_dogs] dogs. On Friday, a family brought in [stray_dog] stray dog they had found, increasing the total number of dogs in the center. The center now has [total_after_friday] dogs after these additions.

***

On Saturday, [number_of_families] families adopted [dogs_per_family] dogs each, which means a total of [total_adopted_dogs] dogs were taken from the rescue center. After the adoptions, Emily now has [current_dogs] dogs remaining in her rescue center. The number of dogs has decreased from [total_after_friday] to [current_dogs] due to the adoptions. The rescue center continues to provide care and shelter for [remaining_dogs] dogs, ensuring they find loving homes.
